idea-plugin.name: TraceFlow
idea-plugin.description: Monitors ASM Trace system logcat output in real time. Filters method entry, exit, catch, and branch events, and navigates to the relevant line in the source file.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Real-time logcat trace monitoring
  • Method entry/exit/catch/branch event filtering
  • Source code navigation from trace events
  • Session export and import (JSON)

action.description: Export events to a JSON file
